insight: When linux1-smart and linux1-full are both active with 10.8.0.2/32, traffic to VPS 10.8.0.1 can route into the dead linux1-smart interface. Disable linux1-smart autoconnect and use linux1-full plus an explicit 10.8.0.0/24 main route; Mihomo current stable VPS path is my-vps-tinyproxy-local.
